title: Salvage tier definition (v1)
description: The single salvage tier file at data/salvage/salvage-tiers.json. Each entry maps an item rarity tier to the materials a player recovers when they break down an item of that tier at a blacksmith via the SALVAGE command.

tiers.description: One salvage yield definition per rarity tier. At most one entry per rarity.

rarity.description: The item rarity tier this yield applies to.

materials.description: Materials produced by salvaging an item of this tier. Each item id must exist under data/items/.

item.description: Id of the yielded material item (data/items/<id>.json).

quantity.description: How many copies of the material the salvage yields. Defaults to 1 when omitted.
